projects.title: EduComm - Academic Platform
projects.description: A full-stack academic platform built with Next.js and Firebase for student-lecturer collaboration
projects.excerpt: Solo-designed and delivered a full-stack academic platform for student and lecturer roles, built on React, Next.js, and Firebase following MVC architecture.

projects.title: IPRK Carbon Monitoring System
projects.description: Enterprise web application for environmental data management and GHG analysis
projects.excerpt: Built a full-stack enterprise application for Iskandar Puteri City Council with role-based access control and real-time GHG analysis.

projects.title: MyPatil - Operations Management System
projects.description: Enterprise operations web system supporting business processes across 8+ modules
projects.excerpt: Developed and maintained Laravel modules for a 50+ person team supporting business operations and administrative processes.
